head.title: Private wealth & succession | MOONSTONE ADVOCATES
head.description: Private Wealth & Succession solicitors offering expert advice on Wills, Trusts, estate planning and administration. Plan for the future with confidence.
head.ogDescription: Private Wealth & Succession solicitors offering expert advice on Wills, Trusts, estate planning and administration. Plan for the future with confidence.

blocks.html:
Private Wealth & Succession

Our Private Wealth & Succession team supports individuals and families with everything from Wills and trusts to estate planning and administration. We offer clear, personal advice to help you get your affairs in order and plan with confidence for the future.

For individuals
Private Wealth & Succession

Services

We offer straightforward, practical support across all areas of Private Wealth & Succession. Whatever stage you’re at, we’ll take the time to understand your wishes and help you plan with clarity and confidence.

Speak to an expert

Lasting Powers of Attorney

If you want someone you trust to make decisions for you if you can’t, a Lasting Power of Attorney is essential.

Lifetime Trusts

If you want to protect your assets and plan for the future, we can help.

Making a Will

If you want certainty over what happens to your estate, a Will gives you peace of mind.

Experts in every area
